sitemap

sitely

  • index landing page - has update log, webrings & cliques
  • sitemap you’re here! has all the pages on my site
  • accessibility accessibility statement
  • credits list of all the stuff i used on this site that isn’t mine
  • guestbook leave a message on my site if you’d like

me

  • about a page about. about me. hi
  • art my artwork!
  • blog my blog where i yap about anything, really
    • youraislopboresme is actually really cool! sharing my favourite interactions with strangers larping as AI
    • happy pokemon day 2026! post on pokemon day 2026! mainly a yap about how much i like espurr
    • how (and-why) you should make a website a messy post targeted towards my friend group on how to make a website
  • shrines pages dedicated to things i really love
    • wizard101 a shrine for the 2008 MMO wizard101

misc

  • links my own contact links, and also buttons to other cool websites
